Index.title: TarotNow Home
Index.tagline: Discover Your Destiny with TarotNow AI
Index.heroDesc: Experience the mystical art of Tarot combined with the deep analytical power of Artificial Intelligence. Unlock the answers hidden within your subconscious.
Index.featureDesc: The perfect blend of ancient spirituality and future technology brings deeply personalized experiences.
Index.f1Desc: Trained on tens of thousands of ancient Tarot texts, our AI provides accurate and personalized interpretations for your specific situation.
Index.f2Desc: Every draw is a chance to collect card elements. Accumulate enough elements to upgrade your cards with more glorious and powerful appearances.
Index.f3Desc: Our Deterministic Shuffle algorithm uses Hashing technology to ensure the drawn cards are the unique, unaltered result of that exact moment.
